org.docgene.help.gui.swing

Interface EngineManager

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractSwingEngineManager, SwingJFXEngineManager, SwingSwingEngineManager

    public interface EngineManager
    The Engine manager interface.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void applyAutocomplete(Article article, java.lang.String title, boolean isDifferentArticle) 
      void applyFullTextSearchLink(java.lang.String term)
      Fired when applying a full text search.
      void back()
      Perform a back action.
      void create()
      Create the engine manager.
      ContentViewer getContentViewer()
      Return the content viewer.
      java.net.URL getPage()
      Return the current page.
      javax.swing.JComponent getScrollPane()
      Return the scroll pane.
      default boolean goTo(Article article, java.lang.String anchor)
      Go to an anchor in a specific article.
      boolean goTo(Article article, java.lang.String anchor, boolean allowReload)
      Go to an anchor in a specific article.
      boolean goTo(java.net.URL url, java.lang.String anchor)
      Go to an anchor in a specific URL.
      boolean loadHTML(java.net.URL url)
      We show embedded HTML content in a JFXPanel because Swing may not render correctly HTML content by default (for example javadoc).
      void pageLoaded(java.net.URL url)
      Called when a page is loaded.
      java.lang.String scroll(java.lang.String desc, boolean isNewPage)
      Scroll to a reference on a page.
      void setContentViewer(ContentViewer viewer)
      Set the ContentViewer
      boolean setPage(java.net.URL url)
      Set the current page.
      void update()
      Update the engine manager.

    • Method Detail

      • getContentViewer

        ContentViewer getContentViewer()
        Return the content viewer.
        Returns:
        the content viewer

      • back

        void back()
        Perform a back action.

      • goTo

        default boolean goTo(Article article,
                     java.lang.String anchor)
        Go to an anchor in a specific article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        anchor - the anchor
        Returns:
        true if the article and the anchor do exist

      • goTo

        boolean goTo(Article article,
             java.lang.String anchor,
             boolean allowReload)
        Go to an anchor in a specific article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        anchor - the anchor
        allowReload - true if reloading pages is allowed
        Returns:
        true if the article and the anchor do exist

      • goTo

        boolean goTo(java.net.URL url,
             java.lang.String anchor)
        Go to an anchor in a specific URL.
        Parameters:
        url - the URL
        anchor - the anchor
        Returns:
        true

      • applyFullTextSearchLink

        void applyFullTextSearchLink(java.lang.String term)
        Fired when applying a full text search.
        Parameters:
        term - the term to search for

      • getPage

        java.net.URL getPage()
        Return the current page.
        Returns:
        the current page

      • setPage

        boolean setPage(java.net.URL url)
        Set the current page.
        Parameters:
        url - the current page URL
        Returns:
        true if the URL do exist

      • create

        void create()
        Create the engine manager.

      • update

        void update()
        Update the engine manager. Typically you have to call this method if you changed the model with an existing engine manager.

      • setContentViewer

        void setContentViewer(ContentViewer viewer)
        Set the ContentViewer
        Parameters:
        viewer - the ContentViewer.

      • getScrollPane

        javax.swing.JComponent getScrollPane()
        Return the scroll pane.
        Returns:
        the scroll pane

      • loadHTML

        boolean loadHTML(java.net.URL url)
        We show embedded HTML content in a JFXPanel because Swing may not render correctly HTML content by default (for example javadoc).
        Parameters:
        url - the URL
        Returns:
        if the html content could be loaded

      • applyAutocomplete

        void applyAutocomplete(Article article,
                       java.lang.String title,
                       boolean isDifferentArticle)

      • pageLoaded

        void pageLoaded(java.net.URL url)
        Called when a page is loaded.
        Parameters:
        url - the page URL

      • scroll

        java.lang.String scroll(java.lang.String desc,
                        boolean isNewPage)
        Scroll to a reference on a page.
        Parameters:
        desc - the reference
        isNewPage - if the reference is in a new page
        Returns:
        the reference f it was possible to scroll, null if not
